author: y4rr
content: Phase 3 v3 corpus + ShadowLlm integration shipped. 1.5M-token public-domain corpus (49 Gutenberg + 8 code), trace at K=4, ShadowLlm trained F1=0.6542 (vs HSP F1=0.461), pin_hot_blocks bug #543 fixed, end-to-end paged_llama3_8b+ShadowLlm verified bit-exact at threshold=-10 (proves the paging path is correct). Remaining: predictor recall tuning (asymmetric BCE / threshold sweep). 85 lib tests pass. Full notes: results/SESSION_NOTES.md
